Co-authored-by:  @ZhengdQin

This PR introduces an optimized W4A8 quantization implementation for MoE.


Weight Quantization (W4): Static Per-Channel Int4 quantization is applied to expert weights.

sglang.title: [model-gateway] optimize radix tree memory and reduce allocations
sglang.author: slin1237
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Replace CharIndexedText with slice-based traversal to eliminate Vec allocation per insert/match operation
Add PrefixMatchResult to return char counts from tree operations, avoiding redundant chars().count() calls in cache_aware policy
Use InsertStep enum to properly handle borrow checker constraints

sglang.title: [model-gateway]: fix grpc embedding test
sglang.author: Ratish1
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
 Fixes a crash in the gRPC HealthCheck path for embedding models and readds the embedding integration test. The gRPC HealthCheck method was creating malformed internal request objects for embedding workers, missing required fields and causing a TypeError: object of type 'NoneType' has no

sglang.title: [model-gateway] Add PrefixHash load balancing policy for KV cache-aware routing
sglang.author: slin1237
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
A lightweight alternative to the cache_aware radix tree policy. Routes requests based on prefix token hash for cache locality.
Algorithm:

Extract first N tokens from request (configurable, default: 256)
Hash token sequence using xxhash for fast, stable hashing
Use consistent hash ring to find targe

sglang.title: Fix temp_prefill_info assertion error in PP disaggregation mode
sglang.author: harvenstar
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
In pipeline parallelism disaggregation mode, log_prefill_stats_late was not being called after processing prefill batches, causing temp_prefill_info to remain set and trigger an assertion error on the next iteration.
This fix adds the missing log_prefill_stats_late call after batch processing to pro

There is no practical need to use --override-transformer-cls-name.
The --mode option,  sgl-diffusion supports inference mode only.
For --distributed-executor-backend, there is currently only a single available backend: mp.
The --output-type option supports only one output format, pli.

sglang.title: Support kv8 (FP8) with torch_native attention backend
sglang.author: JackChuang

sglang.title: [Feature] JIT Fused QK norm + qk norm clean up
sglang.author: DarkSharpness
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation


QK Norm kernel is not efficient enough. Around 2 months ago, flashinfer has released a newer version of QK-norm, which has not been integrated into sgl-kernel. This may lead to poor performance in prefill stage.
QK Norm can not fully utilize GPU bandwidth when the batch size is relative

sglang.title: Refactor fp8 nextn layer for DeepSeek nvfp4 checkpoint
sglang.author: Fridge003
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
In DeepSeek-nvfp4 checkpoint, the moe weights of nextn layer is stored in bf16 precision. We have some logics that quantize nextn moe layer to fp8 optionally, but the codes are a little bit messy.
This PR refactors this part of codes. With flag SGLANG_NVFP4_CKPT_FP8_NEXTN_MOE enabled, dps
